hero.title: Build, launch, and grow your startup
hero.subtitle: The unified platform connecting entrepreneurs, investors, and incubators across Algeria. Programs, coworking spaces, funding — all in one place.

features.title: Everything entrepreneurs need
features.subtitle: From idea to funded startup, in one platform.

programs.title: World-class programs
programs.description: Access incubation, acceleration, and training programs from Algeria's top organizations.

spaces.description: Book coworking, private offices, and meeting rooms in every major Algerian city.

community.title: Active community
community.description: Join events, meet founders, and build relationships that last.

roles.title: Built for everyone in the ecosystem
